message:
Fix managing-plugins skill not triggering for plugin edits

The skill description now emphasizes editing ANY file in the plugins/
directory and explicitly mentions bumping plugin versions as a trigger.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+---
+title: Broaden managing-plugins skill triggers
+type: bugfix
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - claude
+created: 2025-12-08T16:47:09.420831Z
+---
+
+The skill description now emphasizes "editing ANY file in the plugins/ directory" and explicitly mentions "bumping plugin versions" as a trigger, making it clearer when the skill should be loaded.

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "meta",
-  "version": "1.0.1",
+  "version": "1.0.2",
   "description": "Skills for managing the tenzir plugin marketplace",
   "author": {
     "name": "Tenzir",

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 ---
 name: managing-plugins
-description: Create and maintain Claude Code plugins. Use when working in the plugins/ directory, writing SKILL.md, editing plugin.json or hooks.json, updating marketplace.json, creating slash commands, or asking about plugin structure and best practices.
+description: Create and maintain Claude Code plugins. Use when editing ANY file in the plugins/ directory (commands, skills, hooks, or config), bumping plugin versions, registering plugins in marketplace.json, or asking about plugin structure and best practices.
 ---
 
 # Managing Plugins
